name: OxMarkets
notes: First maintainer-reviewed pass for SN35 (previously candidate-discovered/unreviewed, categories empty, no website/source-repo surfaces despite website_url/source_repo already being set). OxMarkets/Cartha is a liquidity-as-a-service subnet powering a permissionless perp DEX (FX, crypto, commodities). Added the missing website and source-repo surfaces. Fixed 7 surfaces having no probe config at all -- the registry-wide gap tracked in #5932. Diffed the full Cartha Verifier OpenAPI schema (58 paths): most are 401/403-gated in practice despite the schema declaring no security scheme (a documentation gap on the operator's side, not a registry concern), and the remaining unauthenticated GETs are either already tracked or require query parameters with no stable canonical value (e.g. /v1/metagraph/compare, /v1/miner/status). One new genuine no-auth public endpoint found and added: GET /pools, returning the registered liquidity-pool/vault list.

surfaces.name: 0xMarkets / Cartha documentation
surfaces.notes: Official 0xMarkets / Cartha documentation, linked from the project website (www.0xmarkets.io).

surfaces.name: Cartha CLI (PyPI)
surfaces.notes: Published PyPI package `cartha-cli` — the official CLI for Cartha subnet (SN35) miners; built from the team's General-Tao-Ventures/cartha-cli repo.

surfaces.name: Cartha principal miner template
surfaces.notes: Official backend template for running a Cartha (SN35) principal miner; in the team's General-Tao-Ventures org.

surfaces.name: 0xMarkets docs source repository
surfaces.notes: Source repository for the 0xMarkets documentation; README states the project is "built on the Cartha Subnet (SN35)". Distinct from the cartha-validator repo at the top level.

surfaces.name: Cartha Verifier API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 schema for the Cartha Verifier API (title: Cartha Verifier). Served publicly at api.cartha.finance; documents SN35 OxMarkets/Cartha miner verification, pool, and lock routes plus the no-auth GET /health probe.

surfaces.name: Cartha Verifier API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health on api.cartha.finance returning liveness JSON (observed: {"status":"ok"}). Documented as GET /health in the subnet OpenAPI spec; api.cartha.finance is the default VERIFIER_URL configured in the official Cartha principal miner template.

surfaces.name: Cartha liquidity-providing metrics
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /v1/lp-stats on api.cartha.finance returning aggregated liquidity-providing metrics for the 0xMarkets landing page (observed top-level fields: apy_tiers, max_apy, tvl, weekly_rewards, emissions, prices, epoch, extras, last_updated). Documented as GET /v1/lp-stats in the subnet OpenAPI spec (api.cartha.finance/openapi.json, already cited for the existing health and OpenAPI surfaces); same api.cartha.finance host as the Cartha Verifier API.

surfaces.name: Cartha registered pools
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /pools on api.cartha.finance returning the registered liquidity-pool/vault list for the Cartha perp DEX (name, poolId, vaultAddress, chainId, network per pool). Documented as GET /pools in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema; distinct from the already-registered lp-stats aggregate-metrics and parent-vaults surfaces.

surfaces.name: Cartha deregistered hotkeys
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the current epoch's deregistered hotkey list. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Cartha parent vaults
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the list of registered parent vaults (address, chainId, name, category). Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.
